description: Bake off simple adjustments that may restore observed trajectory shape.
validation: leave one complete experimental condition out

baseline_repeat_check.note: Two mixed-run files reuse an identical saved baseline pair; the all-pair RMS therefore conservatively includes zero differences.

noise_scale_decomposition.method: fold-specific total value-update residual variance minus the battery-sampling variance propagated through the fitted update; remainder reported as latent process variance

observed_kept_set.description: conditional after-selection forecast using the actual kept candidate value mean at every round
